baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each DEF asset you own (max +4). Scaling collateral breadth — classified portfolio deepens the credit line proportionally.
+$2 cash in any negative GMI year.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 30.

flavourText: National defence is the one budget line that never shrinks.
